recipe: TP4 FP16 XPU graph, llm-scaler INT4 MoE, attention delayed allreduce, block256, MBT512, prefix caching disabled
classifier_update: Refined unknown hidden collectives with producer/consumer context, so attention o_proj hidden reductions classify correctly even when Inductor buffer shape metadata is missing.

boundary_examples.shape_when_known: hidden fp16[tokens, 3072]; many generated buffers lack shape metadata
hidden fp16[tokens, 3072]; many generated buffers lack shape metadata

optimization_implication: Every collective is immediately fenced two generated-code lines after launch, so there is no latent overlap in the current AOT graph.
There are 992 hidden-state collectives across the eight generated files: 496 attention output reductions and 496 MoE output reductions.
The highest-confidence quality-preserving target remains an XPU-supported hidden allreduce plus residual/RMSNorm or projection/MoE epilogue fusion.
Q/K variance reductions are preserved and should not be removed; only an exact fused Q/K variance plus RMS apply path is acceptable.
